page.title: Culture Exam Practice
page.subtitle: Practice for the Cypriot history and culture exam with timed mock tests. Each exam contains 25 questions with a 45-minute time limit. You need 60% (16/25) to pass.

history.empty: You haven't taken any exams yet. Start your first mock exam to begin tracking your progress!

readiness.heroDesc: The Cyprus culture & history exam asks 25 questions in 45 minutes and you need 60% to pass. History and Politics are pulling your score down the most. Start there.
readiness.legend: Mastered = how much of the whole question bank you've locked in. Accuracy = how often you're right on the ones you've tried.

notReady.1: You're heading the right way — readiness is up {{delta}} points to {{currentPercent}}%. Keep going and the pass mark is well within reach.
notReady.2: Nice climb — {{previousPercent}}% to {{currentPercent}}% this week. There's plenty of time to keep building toward passing.

gettingThere.1: Real momentum — up {{delta}} points to {{currentPercent}}%. You're closing in on ready.
gettingThere.2: You're getting there fast: {{currentPercent}}% readiness and climbing. One more good week and you're set.

ready.1: Strong work — {{currentPercent}}% and up {{delta}} points. You're ready; keep the streak alive.
ready.2: You've crossed into ready at {{currentPercent}}%, up from {{previousPercent}}%. Keep sharpening the edges.

thoroughlyPrepared.1: Outstanding — {{currentPercent}}% readiness, up {{delta}} points. You're thoroughly prepared for the exam.
thoroughlyPrepared.2: Peak form: {{currentPercent}}% and still rising. You've learned {{questionsLearned}} of {{questionsTotal}} questions — go book that exam.

notReady.1: You're at {{currentPercent}}% readiness. A short session this week is the quickest way to start climbing toward the pass mark.
notReady.2: Steady at {{currentPercent}}% — you've learned {{questionsLearned}} of {{questionsTotal}} questions. Pick a category and add a few more today.

gettingThere.1: Holding at {{currentPercent}}%. One focused session this week could tip you into ready.
gettingThere.2: You've plateaued around {{currentPercent}}% — a quick round of practice will get things moving again.

ready.1: Steady at {{currentPercent}}% and you're ready. A quick review keeps it locked in.
ready.2: You're holding ready at {{currentPercent}}%. A light session this week keeps your recall fresh.

thoroughlyPrepared.1: Rock solid at {{currentPercent}}% — thoroughly prepared. A brief review is all it takes to stay sharp.
thoroughlyPrepared.2: You're sitting pretty at {{currentPercent}}%, with {{questionsLearned}} of {{questionsTotal}} questions learned. A light pass keeps you exam-ready.

notReady.1: Readiness dipped {{delta}} points to {{currentPercent}}%. No stress — a session or two will bring it right back up.
notReady.2: You've slipped to {{currentPercent}}% from {{previousPercent}}%. It happens — jump back in and you'll recover quickly.

gettingThere.1: Down {{delta}} points to {{currentPercent}}%, but you're close. A quick refresher will get you back on track.
gettingThere.2: A small dip to {{currentPercent}}% this week. Pick up where you left off and you'll be climbing again in no time.

ready.1: Slight slip to {{currentPercent}}%, yet you're still ready. A short review will restore your edge.
ready.2: You eased off {{delta}} points to {{currentPercent}}%. A quick session brings your recall back to full strength.

thoroughlyPrepared.1: Down {{delta}} points but still thoroughly prepared at {{currentPercent}}%. A brief pass keeps you there.
thoroughlyPrepared.2: Even after a dip you're at {{currentPercent}}% — well prepared. Refresh {{questionsLearned}} of {{questionsTotal}} and you're back at your best.

newUser.1: Welcome! The culture bank has {{questionsTotal}} questions. Start a session to begin building your exam readiness.
newUser.2: Ready to begin? Work through the {{questionsTotal}}-question culture bank at your own pace — your progress tracks from day one.
newUser.3: Your Cyprus culture prep starts here, with {{questionsTotal}} questions waiting. Take your first session today.

states.notEnoughQuestions: Not enough questions available to start an exam. At least 25 questions are required.
states.examInProgress: You have an exam in progress. Would you like to continue where you left off?

session.question: Question {{current}} of {{total}}
session.abandonConfirm: Are you sure you want to abandon this exam? Your progress will be lost.
session.recoveryDescription: You have an unfinished mock exam. Would you like to continue where you left off?
session.warning5minDesc: Make sure to submit your remaining answers.
session.warning1minDesc: Your exam will auto-submit when time runs out.
session.timeWarning: Only {{time}} remaining! Submit your answers soon.
session.answerError: Failed to submit answer. Please try again.
session.noQuestionsDescription: No questions available for this exam.
